violations.text: Chemicals were stored on the same shelf with food/equipment/single service articles in the (kitchen). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025

Utensils in the kitchen area are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025
Menu is lacking allergen statement. English Food Allergy Reactions New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024
